goal: Fix RR-18: Add GIT_API_TOKEN to the log redaction list in server.py, update tests, and mark resolved in THREAT_MODEL.md

tasks.name: Add GIT_API_TOKEN to _SECRET_TOKENS in server.py
tasks.action:
1. Update the import line from runenv to include GIT_API_TOKEN:
   `from runenv import CLAUDE_API_TOKEN, DYNAMIC_AGENT_KEY, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, MCP_API_TOKEN, PLAN_API_TOKEN, TESTER_API_TOKEN, GIT_API_TOKEN, SYSTEM_PROMPT, PLAN_SYSTEM_PROMPT`
2. Add GIT_API_TOKEN to the _SECRET_TOKENS list (line 35):
   `_SECRET_TOKENS = [t for t in [CLAUDE_API_TOKEN, DYNAMIC_AGENT_KEY, MCP_API_TOKEN, PLAN_API_TOKEN, TESTER_API_TOKEN, GIT_API_TOKEN] if t]`
No other changes needed — _SECRET_RE and _redact_secrets() are already driven by _SECRET_TOKENS.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes; python -c 'import server' does not error
tasks.done: GIT_API_TOKEN appears in both the runenv import and the _SECRET_TOKENS list in server.py

tasks.name: Update test_server.py mock and add GIT_API_TOKEN redaction test
tasks.action:
1. Add GIT_API_TOKEN to the runenv mock at the top of test_server.py (line ~11):
   `sys.modules['runenv'] = MagicMock(CLAUDE_API_TOKEN='dummy-token', DYNAMIC_AGENT_KEY='dummy-key', ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL='https://api.anthropic.com', MCP_API_TOKEN='dummy-mcp-token', PLAN_API_TOKEN='dummy-plan-token', TESTER_API_TOKEN='dummy-tester-token', GIT_API_TOKEN='dummy-git-token', SYSTEM_PROMPT='test system prompt', PLAN_SYSTEM_PROMPT='test plan system prompt')`
2. Add a new test method to TestRedactSecrets:
   `def test_git_api_token_is_redacted(self):`
   - Assert that 'dummy-git-token' (the GIT_API_TOKEN value) is present in _server_module._SECRET_TOKENS
   - Assert that _redact_secrets('leaked dummy-git-token here') replaces it with [REDACTED]
   This test directly verifies the RR-18 fix — if GIT_API_TOKEN is ever removed from _SECRET_TOKENS, this test will catch it.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes; the new test_git_api_token_is_redacted test passes
tasks.done: test_server.py mock includes GIT_API_TOKEN; dedicated test asserts GIT_API_TOKEN is in _SECRET_TOKENS and is redacted

tasks.name: Mark RR-18 resolved in THREAT_MODEL.md
tasks.action:
Update THREAT_MODEL.md to mark RR-18 as resolved:
1. In section 4.4 (RR-18 description block, ~line 223-233): Add a status line `- **Status: Fixed** — GIT_API_TOKEN added to _SECRET_TOKENS in server.py. Dedicated unit test verifies redaction.`
2. In section 5 'Log Sanitization' bullet (~line 294): Remove the parenthetical gap note `(Gap: GIT_API_TOKEN not currently included — see RR-18.)` and replace with confirmation that all tokens are now redacted.
3. In the STRIDE table (~line 409): Change `GIT_API_TOKEN not redacted (RR-18)` to `~~GIT_API_TOKEN not redacted (RR-18)~~ ✅`
4. In section 9 priority table (~line 455): Change the RR-18 row from `**Open**` to `✅ Done 2026-03-30`, and apply strikethrough formatting matching other resolved rows.
5. In section 6 (Residual Risks), retitle the RR-18 block with strikethrough: `### ~~RR-18: GIT_API_TOKEN Absent from Log Redaction List~~ — RESOLVED (2026-03-30)` and remove the *(NEW)* tag.
tasks.verify: grep for 'RR-18' in THREAT_MODEL.md shows all occurrences are marked resolved/strikethrough; no 'Open' status remains for RR-18
tasks.done: All RR-18 references in THREAT_MODEL.md are marked as resolved with date 2026-03-30
